location: Dropped, together with Ash of War: Giant Hunt, by a Night's Cavalry rider that only spawns after dark, just north of the East Raya Lucaria Gate Site of Grace in Liurnia of the Lakes.
tactics: Night's Cavalry only appears at night — rest at a grace and wait for nightfall if it's daytime.
The rider hits hard and can dismount to keep chasing on foot if unhorsed.
It disappears at dawn, so engage promptly once spotted rather than delaying.
Multiple Night's Cavalry spawn across the map, but this one near East Raya Lucaria Gate is a commonly used early-game source.
lore: A jet-black glaive as weighty as a bludgeon, carried by the Night's Cavalry — ghostly riders who patrol on their funeral steeds after dark, favoring crushing slash attacks that hit even harder from horseback.

builds.name: Strength Halberd (Mounted Combat)
builds.why: C Strength scaling plus a passive damage bonus while mounted make it one of the stronger halberds for Torrent-based combat builds.
